name: Dionysus
description:
(I will do art for them later)

That art is not mine, someone please credit the artist, it’s just kinda close to my design...

“Welcome to the cult of Dionysus!”

I’ve been really, really into Greek mythology and Greek mythology based things lately. I just got a small roll in the Percy Jackson musical at my local community theatre(it’s my first time being in a musical) and I’ve been listening to epic and playing hades and learning about the mythology In general.

Dionysus is thought to be the god of many things, those things include;

Wine

Androgyny

Agriculture

Rebirth

Theatre or drama

Madness

Music

Pleasure

This is MY interpretation of Dionysus... I did a lot of research for this so, youre welcome!

I’m making him a grumpy old masc leaning enby who has a drinking problem, and a boyfriend now shut the up!

He uses he/they mainly...
creator: ALL4U182
